name: 17" Pipestone Outdoor Column Fire Pit Gray - Threshold™: Modern Propane Gas Firepit with Lava Rock and Cover
description:
Provide warmth to your outdoor space season after season with this 17 -Inch Pipetone LP Fire Column from Threshold™. This column heater featuring a round matte silhouette adds a modern flair to your outdoor decor, and sports a weather- and heat-resistant finish for durable outdoor use. Run on propane or liquid petroleum gas, it comes with a control knob that helps you to adjust to the right temperature. The side cut-out handles allow for easy portability from place to place. Whether you're enjoying some time alone or entertaining guests, this outdoor heater will instantly create a cozy and comfortable atmosphere.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
